entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Béèrè mi àwọn ìbéèrè kí tó ṣàlàyé too much."

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Ṣàyẹ̀wò mi ìdáhùn kí giving tirẹ."

entries.source: "Creative presentation openings"
entries.value: "Creative àwọn ìbẹ̀rẹ̀ ìfihàn"

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Fún mi ẹ̀dà tó nira símo lẹ́yìn mo gbìmọ̀ wò."

entries.source: "Ideas for a science project"
entries.value: "Àwọn èrò fún sáyẹ́ǹsì iṣẹ́ àkànṣe"

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Keep ó rọrùn fún ẹni tuntun."

entries.source: "Story concepts about friendship"
entries.value: "Ìtàn-àròsọ àwọn èrò nípa friendship"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Lo àwọn àpẹẹrẹ láti inú ìdánwò mi, iṣẹ́ àkànṣe mi, tàbí ìgbé-ayé ojoojúmọ́ mi."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: AI àwọn ìbéèrè

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Béèrè fún tiny àkọ́kọ́ iṣẹ́.

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer prompts and study loop
entries.value: Creative Brainstormer àwọn ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́

entries.source: Creativity
entries.value: Ìṣẹ̀dá

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: Parí pẹ̀lú recap ìwọ write yourself.

entries.source: For Creative Brainstormer, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Fún Creative Brainstormer, wúlò adaṣe ìyípo jẹ́:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, and unexpected angles.
entries.value: Fún yìí ipo, iṣẹ́ jẹ́ rọrùn: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, àti unexpected angles.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Dára àwọn ìbéèrè sábà fi kún three things: kókó-ẹ̀kọ́, tirẹ lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́ ìpele, àti irú ti ìrànlọ́wọ́ ìwọ fẹ́. ìwọ ṣe kì í ṣe nílò perfect wording. ìwọ nìkan nílò enough àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀ fún ìpàdé láti begin.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Bí ìdáhùn feels púpọ̀ gbooro, narrow ó. béèrè fún one àpẹẹrẹ, one ìmọ̀ aṣìṣe, one ṣàyẹ̀wò ìbéèrè, tàbí one tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀. bí ó feels púpọ̀ easy, béèrè fún challenge. bí ó feels púpọ̀ nira, béèrè fún bridge láti kí ìwọ already mọ̀.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Ṣe output síi tó wúlò

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Creative Brainstormer on inspir.
entries.value: Àwọn èrò ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́ tí a lè tún ṣe fún gbigba èsì ẹ̀kọ́ tó wúlò láti Olùmúná Èrò Ṣíṣẹ́da lórí inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Reading AI ìdáhùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe kan náà gẹ́gẹ́ bí ẹ̀kọ́. lẹ́yìn àkọ́kọ́ ìdáhùn, béèrè ipo láti ṣe ìwọ ṣe ohun kan pẹ̀lú èrò.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Tó jọmọ́ àwọn ọ̀nà ẹ̀kọ́

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request ìdáhùn lórí part yẹn felt uncertain.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond kí asking fún solution.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú ọ̀kan tó mọ́ request

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: State àfojúsùn nínú ọ̀kan sentence.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: ọgbọ́n ẹ̀kọ́

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Yẹn ìkẹyìn recap jẹ́ important. nígbà tí ìwọ ṣàlàyé èrò back, ìwọ fi hàn kí jẹ́ solid àti kí jẹ́ síbẹ̀ borrowed láti AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for creative brainstormer with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Tó dára jù ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ìpàdé jẹ́ adjustable. yìí ipo jẹ́ tuned fún aláṣẹ̀dá brainstormer pẹ̀lú tirẹ̀ own àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn àpẹẹrẹ, àti ẹ̀kọ́ ìṣàn.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Creative Brainstormer is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Ọ̀nà tó yara jù láti rí ìye nínú Olùmúná Èrò Ṣíṣẹ́da ni láti fún AI ní iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́, kì í ṣe kókó nìkan. Kókó kan sọ ohun tí o nífẹ̀ẹ́ sí. Iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ kan sọ irú ìrànlọ́wọ́ tí o nílò.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Lẹ́yìn náà fi kún constraint yẹn ń mú ìpàdé síi ti ara ẹni:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Gbìmọ̀ wò ọ̀kan ti wọ̀nyí starters:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Yí ipo sí adaṣe

entries.source: Use Creative Brainstormer when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Motivation Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Lo Olùmúná Èrò Ṣíṣẹ́da nígbà tí Yìí jẹ́ ẹ̀tọ́ ipo fún iṣẹ́. bí ìwọ fẹ́ jọmọ́ ọ̀nà, gbìyànjú Motivation olùkọ́. ìwọ lè pẹ̀lú ṣàwárí AI ẹ̀kọ́ blog fún àwọn ọ̀nà ẹ̀kọ́, Socratic ẹ̀kọ́, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, ere ipa, àti ìrántí aláṣiṣẹ́.
